rationale: The citing paper states it constructed its meta-analysis from prior econometric studies of direct-to-consumer/brand advertising elasticities (56 publications from 1960–2008), and the cited 2000 JMR paper is an econometric field study of TV advertising effects and carryover in multiple markets. This strong topical/method fit makes it plausibly a primary input study rather than an incidental background mention, so it merits full relation judgment.
